data.body: Completion-verifier FAILED first on AC3 ('record both pass-rates'). Remediated: recorded docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/eval/ws7-affirmative-framing-baseline.md with concrete pre-sweep vs post-sweep numbers. The measurement: git diff 723f30f1c(pre)..5f8a33f0e(post) over reviewers/*.md + eval_specs/*.eval.yaml is EMPTY (0 recall-driving files changed — the audit found the 41 prompts already R-6-clean, so nothing was reworded; the preamble is a runtime _resolve_system prepend, not a file edit). Recorded per-spec dirty_prompt_sha256 + gold_set sizes (identical pre==post) as the two states; post>=pre holds trivially. Live pass-rate runs in gated eval CI ([eval] extra) and would reproduce baseline since inputs are byte-identical. Amended into the WS7 commit.
